arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Liverpool: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea host champions Liverpool in the Premier League on Sunday. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella gives honest thoughts on Chelsea handing Liverpool a Guard of Honour
arts.sum: Marc Cucurella is determined to both stop Liverpool's title party at Stamford Bridge on Sunday, but also to get Chelsea back in amongst the Premier League title fight next term

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Liverpool: How Arne Slot should lineup at Stamford Bridge following Premier League title win
arts.sum: Liverpool are Premier League champions but there are four games remaining, which may give boss Arne Slot a selection dilemma given players still have records to play for.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea or Liverpool? Romano reveals Huijsen decision date
arts.sum: Dean Huijsen's next transfer could be wrapped up relatively swiftly, with Fabrizio Romano revealing that the Bournemouth defender is expected to choose his next club this month. Writing on X after the Arsenal game, transfer insider Fabrizio Romano reiterated that Huijsen's future won't become a drawn-out saga this summer as all parties are aiming for a swift resolution.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah record: How Liverpool star can eclipse Alan Shearer, Didier Drogba in Premier League game against Chelsea
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is a Premier League champion and the winger is nearing a number of records held by some of the league's greatest, including Didier Drogba and Alan Shearer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Liverpool: How Caicedo rejection helped elevate Gravenberch to Premier League elite
arts.sum: It isn’t an exaggeration to say that Moises Caciedo’s decision to reject a move to Liverpool and instead join Chelsea changed the trajectory of Ryan Gravenberch’s career. Had Caice...

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Liverpool All-Time Combined XI
arts.sum: Steven Gerard, Frank Lampard, Mohamed Salah, Eden Hazard and Didier Drogba are just some of the all-time greats that have played for Chelsea and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. Liverpool: Premier League
arts.sum: How Chelsea could line up for their important Premier League fixture against champions Liverpool on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Chelsea: Premier League
arts.sum: How Liverpool could line up for their Premier League clash against Champions League hopefuls Chelsea on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Journalist believes club “rubbing their hands with glee” as Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool all follow player
arts.sum: Ajax are rubbing their hands at the interest in Jorrel Hato, with them not particularly bothered if he joins Arsenal, Chelsea or Liverpool. That’s according to journalist Mike Verweij, via Voetbal Primeur, who believes it is an ideal situation that Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool are continuing to be linked with the youngster.
